text.tspan: Information stays at the top. The next two questions always arrive at the bottom. Loading uses the exact same content geometry.
Where does a city keep its memories?
Where does a city keep its memories?
Two paths will appear when the answer is ready.
Questions stay at the bottom—nothing jumps around while loading.
ities remember in layers: through street names, buildings, archives,
rituals, and the stories residents repeat. Official records preserve
decisions, while everyday memory survives in landmarks, local language,
What a city chooses to preserve—and what it allows to disappear—
reveals who has had the power to define its shared past.
A city's memory is less like a vault and more like a negotiation
✦ Let Sage choose for this turn
Neither path? Adjust direction and redraw
Keep every final element in place from the first loading frame. Grey skeletons become answer text, evidence, and exactly two bottom questions—so the user never has to reorient.
